data.name: Md. Jakir hossain
data.bio: A skilled robotics expert with 7 years of experience in autonomous systems, machine learning, and industrial automation. His innovative approach and deep technical expertise have driven impactful solutions across multiple industries. Deeply committed to advancing intelligent robotics and shaping the future of modern technology through precision and creativity.

data.name: ariful islam badil
data.experience: Chief AI Engineer and Mentor with more than 6 years of industry working experience in Python, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, MLOps, Cloud, Generative AI, AI Agents, and Robotics systems.
data.bio: Data Scientist with 5+ years of experience in Generative AI, LLMOps, and Autonomous AI Systems. Experience in designing, deploying, and scaling enterprise-grade AI solutions across healthcare, self-development, and automation. Skilled in multi-agent architectures, RAG pipelines, and model optimization, delivering measurable impact on scalability, accuracy, and adoption. Recognized contributor at Omdena for global AI collaborations. Winner of the APICTA Merit Award 2021 and ICT Award 2020.
